items.headline: CEO: PGA Tour will consider paths to bring back LIV players
items.description: The PGA Tour will consider additional pathways to bring back LIV Golf players who might want to return to the circuit, CEO Brian Rolapp said Monday.

items.headline: Alejandro Garnacho's attitude at Man United a 'disgrace' - Nicky Butt
items.description: Former Manchester United midfielder Nicky Butt has branded Alejandro Garnacho's attitude during his time at Manchester United a "disgrace"

items.headline: Fantasy Baseball Reliever Depth Chart
items.description: Our updated reliever depth chart displays the closer hierarchy for each team, as well as the fatigue factor in each MLB bullpen.

items.headline: Mariners put Brendan Donovan on 10-day IL, add Will Wilson
items.description: Mariners third baseman Brendan Donovan was placed on the 10-day injured list retroactive to Saturday with a left groin muscle strain.

items.headline: Raptors' Immanuel Quickley (hamstring) out for Game 2 vs. Cavs
items.description: Raptors guard Immanuel Quickley will miss Game 2 of Toronto's first-round playoff series against the Cavs because of a right hamstring strain.

items.headline: Hawaii's Sentry, Sony Open off PGA Tour schedule in 2027
items.description: The PGA Tour will not be in Hawaii in 2027 for the first time in 56 years as it moves toward a revamped schedule that no longer will start the season in the middle of the Pacific Ocean.

items.headline: NFL depth charts for all 32 teams
items.description: Here are the latest NFL depth charts for all 32 teams.

items.headline: Fantasy baseball news: Edwin Diaz placed on IL; Who do Dodgers turn to next?
items.description: All of the important fantasy spin and actionable takeaways resulting from the latest baseball news.

items.headline: Dodgers closer Edwin Diaz on IL, slated for elbow surgery
items.description: Los Angeles Dodgers closer Endwin Diaz is scheduled to undergo surgery to remove loose bodies in his right elbow on Wednesday, the team announced Monday, and the expectation is that he could miss around three months, a source told ESPN's Alden Gonzalez.

items.headline: Expert tips, best tips for Round 7 of the AFL
items.description: Who should you be tipping in Round 7 of the 2026 AFL season? Our footy experts have put their heads together to help you out. So open your ESPN Footytips app, take notes, and get ahead of the game!

items.headline: Chelsea boss Liam Rosenior wants to change perceptions of squad
items.description: Liam Rosenior is determined to change perceptions of  Chelsea's squad amid ongoing scrutiny of his players' conduct during a worrying slump in form.

items.headline: Fantasy baseball lineup advice for Tuesday: Steven Matz positioned for success
items.description: Everything you need to know to set your fantasy baseball lineups for Tuesday's MLB action.

items.headline: Ivan Toney seals Al Ahli rally, spot in Asian Champions League final
items.description: Defending champion Al Ahli reached the final of the AFC Champions League Elite after Ivan Toney's second-half goal beat Vissel Kobe of Japan 2-1 on Monday.

items.headline: Capitals ready if Alex Ovechkin decides to return or retire
items.description: The Capitals' front office says it is prepared for whatever decision captain Alex Ovechkin makes. The 40-year-old is deciding whether or not he will return for a 22nd NHL season.

items.headline: NBA breaks ties for 2026 draft position; Jazz keep protected pick
items.description: The NBA conducted its tiebreaking process for the league's 2026 draft, setting the order from 15 to 30 and breaking a pair of ties among teams nestled inside the lottery.
